coffee-pub-minstrel.defaultFadeSeconds-Hint: Default fade duration used when Minstrel starts or stops tracks.
coffee-pub-minstrel.recentLimit-Hint: How many recently used tracks Minstrel stores for the world.
coffee-pub-minstrel.combatRestoreDelayMs-Hint: Delay in milliseconds before Minstrel restores the previous sound state after combat automation ends.
